title: elaphoglossum lepidoglossum
intro: Elaphoglossum lepidoglossum, also known as the "Lepidoglossum fern", is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its reported medicinal properties. It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Elaphoglossum lepidoglossum is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
